system.notes: Turbine boost for methane/gas/diesel engines (the 'superconductive drive' does the same for electric). Each level adds +15 Speed and +10 Acceleration; new max Speed = initial max × 1.25. Design cost = power-plant Design-Point cost × 1.5 per level; parts cost = vehicle's original cost × 1.10 per level; Avail 6/12 days; Street Index 2; Base Time 8 hrs. Rigger 2 p.122.
